label: P&L / NAV / Exposure Charts
description: Live vs batch time series comparison of P&L, NAV, and exposure with drift analysis and mode indicators.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets globally in widget-wrapper.tsx.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.7.note: Empty state guard added: shows message when all series arrays are empty and not loading.

0.8.note: OverviewData interface exposes no error field; widget cannot surface context errors. Global WidgetErrorBoundary covers render errors only. Recorded as known issue.

0.9.note: No dead code, no commented-out blocks.

l0.notes: All checks pass. 0.7 empty state added. 0.8 context error gap recorded as known issue.

1.1.note: Widget reads data exclusively via useOverviewDataSafe(); no inline fetch.

1.2.note: use-overview-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() and filters by scope.organizationIds/clientIds/strategyIds.

1.3.note: seedTimeSeries and strategyPerformance recompute when org filter changes.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays pass through to getAggregatedPnlForScope([], [], []) returning unfiltered dataset.

1.7.note: Widget file has no mock imports. Context layer type-only import is not a widget concern.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (WebSocket P&L stream), batch ✓ (shows liveBatchData comparison + batch date picker), paper ✓ (reads mode badge). Widget renders mode badge using context.mode.

3.2.note: Context reads wsScope.mode from useGlobalScope(); WebSocket enabled only when mode==='live' (use-overview-page-data.ts line 143).

3.3.note: Human check: chart has no order entry; no submit buttons to disable in batch.

3.4.note: Human check: batch indicator (Database icon + asOfDatetime date) visible in Badge when mode !== 'live'.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget renders mode badge via context.mode check on line 66. If paper mode added, badge will show correctly without code change.

3.6.note: No setInterval or direct WebSocket in widget file. WebSocket disabled in batch via wsScope.mode === 'live' check in context producer.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3/3.4 require human browser walkthrough.

4.1.note: No dead buttons: 'Hide/Show Time Series' toggle button calls setShowTimeSeries. ValueFormatToggle wires to setValueFormat. No empty onClick handlers.

4.2.note: No href='#' found. No outbound links in this widget.

4.3.note: Human check: batchDate input field for selecting comparison date.

4.4.note: Human check: date change triggers batchDate state update and LiveBatchComparison re-render.

4.5.note: No links to gated pages in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in widget render path.

4.7.note: Human check: Tabs (P&L / NAV / Exposure) switch content correctly.

4.8.note: Human check: overflow-auto on root div; chart scrolls within widget bounds.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies with P&L data — primarily DeFi basis-trade, staked-basis, yield strategies producing liveTimeSeries and batchTimeSeries data. Widget is strategy-agnostic at render level.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 9 tests covering P&L/NAV/Exposure tabs, live/batch mode badge, time-series toggle, loading, empty-state, null-context fallback. See tests/widgets/overview/pnl-chart.test.tsx

7.1.note: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgb[a]?\(|hsl[a]?\(' → zero matches. text-[var(--status-live)] is a CSS var reference, not a hardcoded color.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: 155 lines — under 500-line limit. No single function > 200 lines.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= found.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo with inline object/array deps. batchDate state is primitive string. No expensive derives needing memoization at widget level.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: pnl-chart-widget.tsx:65 — text-[10px] replaced with text-micro (token already exists in globals.css: --text-micro 0.625rem / 10px). Zero arbitrary text-[Npx] classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, Spinner from shared primitives. Button (toggle) type='button' correct.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt, no interactive div without role. Toggle button has type='button'. Human: keyboard-only walkthrough pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: pnl-chart is a full-height visualization widget; merging with strategy-table or kpi-strip would create an unusably tall widget.

relationships.notes: Reads scope from global-scope-store (driven by scope-summary). Standalone vis widget.

dataContract.notes: Live P&L points streamed via WebSocket (ws://localhost:8030/ws) in live mode. batchTimeSeries from /api/trading/live-batch-delta REST. Date picker drives batchDate param.

gaps: Batch date picker behavior not verified with real API data
Chart rendering at minW=3 not tested
coverage.notes: Strategy-agnostic at render level; covers all strategies that produce timeseries P&L data.

knownIssues.description: OverviewData context interface exposes no error field. Widget cannot surface context-level fetch errors.
knownIssues.resolution: Add error: Error | null to OverviewData interface and wire from use-overview-page-data.ts.

knownIssues.description: overview-data-context.tsx imports TimeSeriesPoint and PnLBreakdown types from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data.

findings.description: pnl-chart-widget.tsx — empty state was missing for when all time series arrays are empty
findings.fix: Added no-data guard that triggers when all liveTimeSeries/batchTimeSeries/realtimePnlPoints arrays are empty and loading is complete

findings.description: pnl-chart-widget.tsx — ~6 user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: pnl-chart-widget.tsx:65 — text-[10px] on mode Badge chip
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro utility (token --text-micro: 0.625rem already exists in globals.css).
